features: „ÄêParty Essentials„Äë You will receive 12 pieces of different styles of starry sky and outer space paper party bags, printed with very cute and fantastic space designs, enough quantity to meet your party decoration needs, you can also give them to your little friends. Throw an amazing outer space party!

„ÄêHigh Quality Material„Äë Our gift bags are made of kraft paper, smooth to the touch. Gift bags are double-sided printing, bright color. The small gift bags have a handle, simple and practical and can hold most small items, for example, candies, cookies, chocolates, small toys or other small items.

„ÄêHand-Held Convenience„Äë Designed with practicality in mind, our paper party bags feature convenient handles for easy carrying. Whether filled with treats, toys, or party favors, these bags provide hassle-free transportation, allowing guests to take home their goodies with ease.

„ÄêParty Essentials„Äë Party bags for kids party are the most popular element pattern of the moment. Cartoon patterns that both boys and girls will love. Kids can decorate the party with gift bags, adding color to the party. They will enjoy the party with these interesting gift bags.

„ÄêWide Range of Application„ÄëThese outer space paper party bags are suitable for Planet parties, Space parties, Galaxy parties, astronomical events, birthday parties, house parties, adventure parties, school events, or any other Space-related activities. Pack your best wishes and gifts with our party bags.
